value.found_quote: Anthropic's Claude models are available through Vertex AI. ... Claude is also available through Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Claude being available on third-party cloud platforms including Vertex AI, Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry, with active model IDs and SDK usage examples. This substantiates that Anthropic offers Claude on third-party platforms.
